summary: Complete testing of engine selection feature (iteration 3). All 13 backend tests and all frontend flows passed. Tested: session engine storage (fal/openai/default), FAL.ai regression, OpenAI gpt-image-1 real API calls for both picto (1024x1024) and illustration (1536x1024), engine modal UI, and navigation flow.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby on Shadcn DialogContent — console warning only, no user impact

critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean and correct. Engine field defaults to 'fal' in both Session model and SessionCreate model — backward compatible with old sessions.
OpenAI branch: correctly uses AsyncOpenAI client, saves PNG to UPLOADS_DIR, returns /api/static/uploads/uuid.png via BACKEND_URL — verified accessible.
Picto size=1024x1024, quality=medium for openai — verified correct in server.py line 326.
Illustration size=1536x1024, quality=medium for openai — verified correct in server.py line 411.
NewSession.jsx correctly reads engine from location.state?.engine (new session) OR from sess.engine (existing session loaded from DB) at lines 61 and 75.
StepArticle.jsx: engine prop passed in all 5 generate calls (lines 131, 138, 157, 182, 188, 197) — fully correct.
No _id exposed in any MongoDB response — projection {_id: 0} used consistently.

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 tests) — 6 session engine field tests + 3 FAL regression + 4 OpenAI gpt-image-1
success_rate.frontend: 100% — modal open, fal default selection, openai selection, cancel, confirm navigation (both engines)

test_credentials: OPENAI_API_KEY and FAL_KEY in backend/.env — all real API calls made, images generated
seed_data_creation: 3 test sessions created and auto-cleaned by pytest fixtures (TEST_Engine_FAL_Session, TEST_Engine_OpenAI_Session, TEST_Engine_Default_Session). Generated images saved to backend/static/uploads/ (not cleaned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Engine feature fully tested and working. OpenAI gpt-image-1 returns base64-encoded PNG saved to UPLOADS_DIR and served via /api/static/uploads/uuid.png. FAL.ai returns CDN URLs (fal.media). Session engine field defaults to 'fal'. Frontend modal: data-testid=engine-modal, engine-option-fal (blue), engine-option-openai (purple), engine-modal-cancel, engine-modal-confirm. Generated OpenAI images verified PNG header (\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n) and size >1MB for illustration.
rca_of_issues: No issues found. All engine feature endpoints and UI flows functional.
